rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks using only identifiers visible in the current component scope.
Place assume/guarantee/const/eq clauses in component type annexes when describing interface behavior; use implementation annexes only for assign clauses binding subcomponents.
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations to justify assumptions and guarantees.
Map requirement intent (e.g., signal flow, timing) to AGREE contracts using only model-exposed ports and connections.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `const`, `eq` in type scope; `assign` only in implementation scope.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants.
Do not invent or reuse identifiers from examples; use only current-case visible names.
